action.reasoning: Observation: Training finally succeeded this iter (losses decreased steadily 1.71→1.15 over 32 steps on 64 samples, checkpoint saved with adapter/processor/grid), debug confirmed matching token/feature counts (240), but eval failed with HFValidationError on base_model path '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct' in isolated eval container (repo id validation). No prior successful grounding_score after 24 iters. test_prep confirmed ~7k samples with abs-pixel bbox/point targets. Analysis: Single full-conversation apply_chat_template + assistant-header search for prompt_len + correct Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration class resolved the longstanding mismatch (executed code completed despite workspace truncation). Eval container likely has restricted /data access for base (only workspace + test /data mounted), causing load fail. Merged full model save to checkpoints/model eliminates Peft/base dependency. Current scale small but loss trend positive; parser/rescale/clip/defaults in predict.py solid per contract. Decision: Provide FULL complete non-truncated train.py (512 samples, 128 steps ~0.25 epoch, expanded LoRA targets, metrics.jsonl logging, merge_and_unload+save full model/processor/grid) and predict.py (load merged model from ckpt/model, remove /data base+Peft). Run test_prep+train then submit_eval for first grounding_score + time measurement before further scaling data/epochs/LR.
